Thanks for opening the discussion. Based on the latest market reference I’m seeing, I can start at 6.75 per unit for this commitment. If you’re prepared to discuss volume and delivery timing, I’m open to working through structure, but I’d like to anchor the pricing around current market conditions. There is no buyer offer yet, so the appropriate move is to open with a seller offer. The latest market-check shows 6.75, which supports a strong anchor well above my internal minimum while preserving room to negotiate.

events.note: I can’t move forward at 6.75 per unit. Even allowing for the recent market disruption, that level is far outside the range I can justify for our procurement program and would undermine downstream margin. If there’s a path to a materially lower number tied to volume or scheduling flexibility, I’m open to continuing the discussion, but I have to decline this opening offer.
